items.reviewerNotes: Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0782 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Diagram shows two continuous white lines + stop sign before intersection meaning 's'arrêter et céder le passage' (stop and yield). No clear exact qid match in candidates.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Blue rectangular 'P' sign = generic car park. Source key = B ('parking en plein air'). Candidate matches are ambiguous between indoor/outdoor; safer to create new localized item.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0746 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Rectangular toll booth sign with ticket/hand icon; q0800 = 'stop to get a card' matches source A 'borne de retrait de ticket de péage'.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Triangle train warning with supplementary stripes/distance. Source selects '100 m ... non surveillé' (C) but candidate q0682 mapping of numeric options differs (50 vs 100) and candidates disagree on which option letter maps to which distance. Numeric mismatch -> unresolved until verifier confirms distance/stripe convention.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image is a yellow triangular warning sign with a black cross — a crossroad. q0764's meaning 'intersection' matches; source option C ('intersection en croix') is the matching localized letter.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Scene shows pedestrians at an intersection — safe action is to slow down and pass at reduced speed. q0364 matches exactly; source option C is the localized equivalent.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Dashboard indicator (green) appears to be the front-fog lamp symbol. q0580 has 'front fog light is turned on' as an option — maps to source option A. Top machine match was different (trunk open), so moderate risk. Rejected top matcher: Top machine match q0617 indicates trunk/boot open which conflicts with the visual fog-light semantics; q0580 is a better semantic match.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Image shows a triangular marked area circled, but candidate mappings conflict (guide line / cross-hatched / stop line) and the source options are ambiguous; cannot confidently map to an existing qid.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Rectangular sign with red/white diagonals typically indicates direction to pass an obstacle, but image tags do not show stripe orientation (left/right). Cannot determine whether 'circulation à gauche' or 'à droite' or other option is correct.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0464 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Image shows two solid white center lines with opposite-direction arrows — meaning a separation line that cannot be crossed for opposite directions. No close existing qid match.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks what to do when wipers cannot wipe in a storm; q0145 correct = 'immediately reduce speed and stop at the road side'. That meaning corresponds to French option C.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0585 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Question about flashing light at railway crossing — correct behavior is to stop / not cross the stop line (French D). No clear exact existing qid match; choose createNew. Moderate uncertainty due to possible jurisdictional phrasing.
Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Image shows two continuous yellow center lines on a two-way road — this is a prohibitive marking. No clear existing qid match in shortlist.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Green rectangular motorway sign with telephone pictogram = highway emergency/public phone; candidate q0761 meaning ('highway emergency phone') matches source option C ('poste d'appel d'urgence'). Visual semantics align.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Blue circular mandatory sign with single white upwards arrow = 'obligation d'aller tout droit'. Candidate q0855 ('going straight only') matches this meaning; map to local option B. Rejected top matcher: Top machine suggestion q0769 (main road priority) is semantically different from this 'go straight only' mandatory sign.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Blue circular sign with arrows straight + right = 'go straight or turn right'. q0768 in bank corresponds to 'going straight and right turn' (master correct key differs but meaning matches); local option A corresponds to that meaning. Rejected top matcher: Top machine suggestion q0868 ('turn right') does not capture the combined 'straight or right' meaning.
Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Conservative unresolved decision because evidence was insufficient.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0369 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.
